case_title: WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING,LLC VS. JOEFFERY F. THOMAS et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING,LLC SERVED JUN-04-2005, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TOMAS, JOEFFERY F.
